title: ➡️ Human Review Gate 1 (HRG-1): Merge Approval [HRG-1]
content:
➡️ Human Review Gate 1 (HRG-1): Merge Approval [HRG-1]
* STOP EXECUTION.
* Present the "Merge Candidate Report" [P1-B] and the "Baseline Test Report" [P2-A] to the human user.
* Request: "Do you approve this merge strategy? [Yes/No/Modify]"
* Proceed only upon "Yes."
Phase 3: Validated Amalgamation [P3]
* Execute Approved Merge [P3-A]:
* Execute the merge strategy precisely as approved in [HRG-1].
* Flag any new conflicts that arise (if any) and place them in CONFLICTS.md for the swarm.
* Post-Merge Validation [P3-B]:
* Run the exact same test suite from [P2-A] on the newly amalgamated main branch.
* Definition of Completion: This phase is complete only if the test results are equal to or better than the baseline. If new tests fail, this is the primary focus for Phase 5.
Phase 4: Analysis & Task Definition [P4]
* Repository Knowledge Graph [P4-A]:
* Scan the amalgamated main branch.
* Generate the interconnected knowledge graph mapping files, functions, dependencies, and user context.
context: From document: full best practices house keeping; — chunk 3 (chunk 3/24)
